exploreHint: When the demo is not playing, the site stays in free exploration mode so you can switch chapters and read notes directly.

callout.demoBody: The full app demo is playing. Use previous, next, pause, and speed controls to adjust the pacing.
callout.exploreBody: Without starting the demo, the prototype stays in free exploration mode. You can switch chapters, pin annotation cards, or share the current view.

home.label: Home
home.summary: Start with the recent practice overview and daily reminder.

practice.label: Practice
practice.summary: Focus on the live dashboard, goals, and practice feedback.

report.label: Report
report.summary: Review analysis results, jump to issues, and retry weak segments.

history.label: History
history.summary: Look back at trends and individual practice sessions.

settings.label: Settings
settings.summary: Adjust presets, goals, and detection rules.
